articles.description: Newly released US Justice Department records reveal how Jeffrey Epstein cultivated relationships with model scouts, agency insiders and recruiters who connected him with young women from around the world, years after concerns about his conduct first emerged.

articles.title: ‘Civic sense, zero potholes, less honking, functional street lights’: Indian traveller in Bangkok shares simple things that Indian cities lack
articles.description: Indian cities often fall short on basic amenities like roads and waste management. A traveler's observations in Bangkok reveal a stark contrast. The Thai capital excels in everyday details, from pothole-free roads to civic discipline. This suggests a need to prioritize fundamental upkeep over grand projects. Citizen responsibility and infrastructure maintenance are key to improving urban life.

Despite the film's massive success, Mulay notes it didn't significantly boost her career, with 'Dil Chahta Hai' proving more impactful. She highlights Gowariker's meticulous direction and the cast's dedication.

articles.title: Mythri Movie Distributors LLP & Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Movie Makers Acquire Vijay Antony's Vanda Devullu Telugu Theatrical Rights
articles.description: Blockbuster Distributors Mythri Movie Distributors LLP & Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Movie Makers For Vijay Antony and Director Sasi’s Emotional Drama Vanda Devullu Known for doing strong content based movies with distinctive concepts, Versatile Star Vijay Antony has built a strong following among Telugu audiences over the years. One of the most memorable milestones in his career came through his collaboration with director Sasi on Bichagadu, a film that transcended expectations and emerged as a sensational success. The duo, celebrated for delivering a deeply moving cinematic experience, joined forces once again for Vanda Devullu, a film that carries a strong emotional core while weaving together drama and intrigue. Backed by Ramanjaneyulu Javvaji under the Sarvanth Ram Creations banner and presented by Fatima Vijay Antony in association with Vijay Antony Film Corporation, Vanda Devullu is positioned as an emotionally charged entertainer that explores human relationships, unexpected twists, and compelling drama, promising a heartfelt and engaging experience on the big screen. Blockbuster distributors Mythri Movie Distributors LLP and Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Movie Makers acquired the theatrical rights of Vanda Devullu for Nizam and Andhra Pradesh respectively. They recently successfully distributed Raakasa which turned out to be a commercial hit. Their association will have an additional benefit for Vanda Devullu. The project has been attracting attention ever since it was announced. Every promotional asset released so far- from posters and songs to glimpse and teaser, has sparked interest and fueled anticipation among moviegoers. With the buzz steadily growing, the film is all set for a grand worldwide theatrical release on June 19. The film brings together a diverse lineup of performers, with Vijay Antony leading a cast that includes Swasika, Ajay, Kavya, Sakthi, Padini, Karnas, Balaji Sakthivel, Divakar, Arul Doss, Bucks, Vinodhini, Munishkanth, and Kodangi Vadivelu, each contributing significantly to the narrative. On the technical front, Vanda Devullu is backed by a skilled team. SB Darshan Kirlosh captures the film’s visual mood through his cinematography, while Balaji Sriram provides the soundtrack that complements its emotional depth. Editing duties are handled by Harish Yuvaraj, and the dialogues have been crafted by Bhashyasree. Combining an experienced cast, a capable technical crew, and a story rooted in strong emotions, the film is shaping up to be a compelling dramatic entertainer. With its release fast approaching and audience curiosity already on the rise, the makers are preparing an aggressive promotional campaign to take the buzz surrounding the film to the next level. Cast : Vijay Antony, Swasika, Ajay, Lijomol Jose, Kavya, Shakti, Padini, Karnas, Balaji Sakthivel, Divakar, Arul Dass, Bucks, Vinodhini, Munishkanth, Kodangi Vadivelu and others. Technical Crew: Banner: Vijay Antony Film Corporation, Sarvanth Ram Creations Presented by: Fatima Vijay Antony Producer: Ramajanjaneyulu Javvaji Director: Shashi Music: Balaji Sri Ram DOP: SB Darshan Kirlosh Editor: Harish Yuvraj Dialogues: Bhashyasree PRO: Sai Satish

articles.title: Movie dialogue of the day: Iconic ‘The Godfather’ line written by Mario Puzo and Francis Ford Coppola that became a cultural phenomenon

This phrase, originating from a 1972 crime drama, signifies an offer so compelling, it leaves no room for refusal, reflecting the Corleone family's formidable influence and strategic power.

articles.title: 5 signs from the universe that you may be on the wrong path
articles.description: Many people now focus on life satisfaction over mere success. Conversations about universal signs are gaining traction. These subtle nudges suggest a need to re-evaluate one's direction. Paying attention to these signs can lead to a more authentic existence.
